title: A Resolution Approving and Adopting the Barangay Ordinance No. 001 Series 2019 of Sangguniang Barangay Malinta Entitled ?an Ordinance Authorizing the City / Municipality of Los Baños to Issue Barangay Clearance and Collect Corresponding Barangay Clearance Fee in the Application for Any Business Related Transactions Subject to the Remittance of the Aforesaid Fees to the Barangay and the Conditions Hereunder.? (AUTHOR: HON. GERONIMO A. CICERON, 01/17/2020)
